name: Marrakech
description: The Red City, known for its vibrant souks, palaces, and gardens.

name: Chefchaouen
description: The Blue Pearl of Morocco, famous for its blue-washed buildings.

name: Fes
description: The cultural capital, home to the oldest university and intricate medinas.

name: Merzouga
description: Gateway to the Sahara Desert, perfect for camel treks and stargazing.

name: Essaouira
description: A coastal wind city popular for surfing and fresh seafood.
